name: Sauteed Apples, Onions & Red Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 4 tart apples (like Gravensteins) peeled, thinly sliced
2 onions, each cut in half, then cut into thin slivers
butter, duck fat, olive oil or bacon fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Saute apples separately in a small amount of butter, duck fat, olive oil, or bacon fat until cooked through.
3. Remove the sautéed apples and add onions. Continue sauting until cooked through.
4. Add cabbage and saute until cooked through. Stir in 2 to 4 tablespoons apple cider vinegar; it will turn a lovely pink color.
5. Place all ingredients in a large mixing bowl, toss lightly, and then transfer to a baking dish.
6. Cover the pan loosely with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
